description: Assertions for a controlled score where only synthetic-job-001 qualifies.
assertions: At most 10 Actor items reach one OpenAI batch request.
Only schema-valid scores at or above the configured threshold reach the selected destination.
Exactly one Slack, Gmail, Telegram, Google Sheets, or Notion branch executes.
Alert destinations receive one digest with no more than five jobs; storage destinations receive one record per qualified job.
An immediate delivered-item rerun creates no destination writes.
A destination failure does not commit job IDs to the delivery ledger.
